## Imports

## Dependency Analysis

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L46"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### analyze_dependency_order

>  analyze_dependency_order (project:Optional[str]=None, enforce:bool=False)

*Analyze notebook dependency graph to suggest numbering order.*

Ranks notebooks by their internal import dependencies to determine the
optimal ordering. Optionally enforces the suggested numbering by
renaming notebooks.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>enforce</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, rename notebooks to match suggested order.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘suggestions’ list and ‘applied’ count if
enforce=True.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L153"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### dependency_tree

>  dependency_tree (project:Optional[str]=None, scope:str='internal',
>                       include_unused:Optional[str]=None,
>                       write_qmd:Optional[str]=None)

*Summarize internal and external module dependencies.*

Analyzes import statements across all notebooks to build a dependency
graph. Can generate Mermaid and DOT diagrams.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scope</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>internal</td>
<td>‘internal’, ‘external’, or ‘both’ to control which deps to
show.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_unused</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>‘internal’, ‘external’, or ‘both’ to include unused imports.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>write_qmd</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Path to write a Quarto document with diagrams.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with nodes, edges, mermaid/dot diagrams, and optional
written file.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### find_symbol

>  find_symbol (symbol:str, project:Optional[str]=None)

*Find modules/notebooks exporting a given symbol.*

Uses \_modidx.py to look up where a symbol is exported from.

<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Symbol name to search for.</td>

### dependency_snapshot

>  dependency_snapshot (project:Optional[str]=None, scope:str='internal',
>                           include_unused:Optional[str]=None,
>                           write_qmd:Optional[str]=None)

\*Combine dependency tree with \_modidx to spot gaps.\*

Compares the dependency graph with \_modidx.py to find: - Modules in
dependency tree but missing from \_modidx - Modules in \_modidx but not
referenced in dependency tree

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>

<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scope</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>internal</td>
<td>‘internal’, ‘external’, or ‘both’ for dependency_tree scope.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_unused</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>‘internal’, ‘external’, or ‘both’ to include unused imports.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>write_qmd</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Path to write a Quarto document with diagrams.</td>

<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘missing_in_modidx’ and ‘unused_in_tree’
lists.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>

### export_diagram

>  export_diagram (project:Optional[str]=None, format:str='svg',
>                      output_path:Optional[str]=None, scope:str='internal',
>                      engine:str='dot')

*Generate visual dependency graph as SVG or PNG.*

Creates a visual diagram of module dependencies. Requires graphviz to be
installed for rendering.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>

<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>format</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>svg</td>
<td>Output format: ‘svg’, ‘png’, or ‘dot’ (raw DOT source).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>output_path</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Path to write the output file. Defaults to
‘docs/dependencies.{format}’.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scope</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>internal</td>
<td>‘internal’, ‘external’, or ‘both’ to control which deps to
show.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>engine</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>dot</td>
<td>Graphviz engine: ‘dot’, ‘neato’, ‘fdp’, ‘sfdp’, ‘circo’,
‘twopi’.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘path’ to generated file and ‘format’
used.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## External Library Indexing

## [`index_external_libs`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/11_tools/analysis.html#index_external_libs)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L602"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### index_external_libs

>  index_external_libs (project:Optional[str]=None, force:bool=False)

*Index external libraries used by the project.*

Scans project notebooks for external imports (torch, transformers, etc.)
and generates cached \_modidx.py files for documentation lookup.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>force</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, regenerate indices even if cached versions exist.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result dict with:<br>- ok: bool - Success status<br>-
packages: List[str] - Packages found in project<br>- indexed: List[str]
- Successfully indexed packages<br>- failed: List[str] - Packages that
failed to index<br>- pretty: str - Formatted output</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## [`lookup_external_symbol`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/11_tools/analysis.html#lookup_external_symbol)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L660"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### lookup_external_symbol

>  lookup_external_symbol (symbol:str, packages:Optional[List[str]]=None,
>                              project:Optional[str]=None)

*Look up documentation for an external symbol.*

Searches cached package indices to find documentation links and source
file locations for symbols from external libraries.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>symbol</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>The symbol name to look up (e.g., ‘torch.nn.Module’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>packages</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Specific packages to search in. If not provided, searches<br>all
indexed packages from the project.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Used to determine which packages to
search.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result dict with:<br>- ok: bool - Success status<br>-
symbol: str - The searched symbol<br>- found: bool - Whether the symbol
was found<br>- doc_url: str - Documentation URL (if found)<br>-
source_file: str - Source file location (if found)<br>- package: str -
Package containing the symbol<br>- pretty: str - Formatted
output</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## [`index_local_projects`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/11_tools/analysis.html#index_local_projects)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L726"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### index_local_projects

>  index_local_projects (include_paths:Optional[List[str]]=None,
>                            force:bool=False)

*Index local nbdev projects from editable pip installs.*

Discovers packages installed with `pip install -e .` and indexes those
that have a `_modidx.py` (nbdev projects) for cross-project symbol
lookup.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>include_paths</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Additional paths to scan for nbdev projects.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>force</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, refresh the cache even if already indexed.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result dict with:<br>- ok: bool - Success status<br>-
indexed: List[Dict] - Successfully indexed projects<br>- failed:
List[Dict] - Projects that failed to index<br>- total_cached: int -
Total projects in cache<br>- pretty: str - Formatted
output</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## [`interactive_dependency_graph`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/11_tools/analysis.html#interactive_dependency_graph)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L774"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### interactive_dependency_graph

>  interactive_dependency_graph (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                                    output_path:Optional[str]=None,
>                                    include_duplicates:bool=True,
>                                    similarity_threshold:float=0.8,
>                                    open_browser:bool=True)

*Generate an interactive hierarchical dependency graph.*

Creates a Cytoscape.js visualization showing: - Module level (top):
Package modules as containers - Notebook level (middle): Notebooks
within each module - Symbol level (bottom): Functions, classes,
constants within notebooks

Edges show: - Import dependencies (A supports B if B imports from A) -
Code duplication (exact, similar, suspected)

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>output_path</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Output HTML path. Defaults to project/dep_graph.html.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_duplicates</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>Whether to detect and show code duplications.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>similarity_threshold</td>
<td>float</td>
<td>0.8</td>
<td>Minimum similarity for ‘similar’ duplicates (0.5-1.0).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>open_browser</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>Whether to open the graph in a browser.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result dict with:<br>- ok: bool - Success status<br>-
output_path: str - Path to generated HTML file<br>- stats: Dict - Graph
statistics (modules, notebooks, symbols, edges)<br>- pretty: str -
Formatted output summary</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### suggest_location

>  suggest_location (code:str, project:Optional[str]=None)

*Suggest canonical location for code based on its content.*

Analyzes the code pattern to recommend where it should live in the
project structure (e.g., path functions → 00_utils/08_paths.ipynb).

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />

<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>code</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>The code snippet to analyze.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘suggested_location’ and ‘reason’.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### check_before_create

>  check_before_create (proposed_path:str,
>                           proposed_exports:Optional[List[str]]=None,
>                           project:Optional[str]=None)

*Check if proposed exports already exist or belong elsewhere.*

Before creating a new notebook, checks: - If any proposed symbols
already exist in \_modidx - If the proposed location overlaps with
existing modules - If utilities should go in 00_utils/ instead

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>proposed_path</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Proposed notebook path (e.g., ‘50_install/02_paths.ipynb’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>proposed_exports</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>List of symbol names to be exported.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘warnings’ and ‘suggestions’ for each proposed
export.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L1184"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### detect_migrations_needed

>  detect_migrations_needed (project:Optional[str]=None)

*Find overlapping modules that should be consolidated.*

Detects: - Symbols exported from multiple notebooks - Modules with
similar names in different locations - Deprecated modules that still
have exports

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />

</tr>

<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>

</tr>

### dependency_notebook

>  dependency_notebook (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                           output_path:Optional[str]=None,
>                           scope:str='internal', include_stats:bool=True)

*Generate a notebook with dependency graph as Mermaid cells.*

Creates or updates a notebook with: - Mermaid diagram of module
dependencies - Statistics about the project structure - List of
unreferenced modules

The Mermaid diagram renders directly in VS Code and Jupyter.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>output_path</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Path for output notebook. Defaults to
‘nbs/99_meta/dependency_graph.ipynb’.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scope</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>internal</td>
<td>‘internal’, ‘external’, or ‘both’ to control which deps to
show.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_stats</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, include statistics cells.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘path’ to generated notebook.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L1420"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### generate_api_docs

>  generate_api_docs (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                         output_path:Optional[str]=None,
>                         include_private:bool=False, include_source:bool=True)

*Generate API reference documentation from exported symbols.*

Creates a markdown file with all exported functions, classes, and their
docstrings organized by module.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>output_path</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Path for output file. Defaults to ‘docs/api_reference.md’.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_private</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, include symbols starting with underscore.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_source</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, include source file links.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘path’ to generated file and ‘symbols’
count.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
